nameMeanings.name: Heron
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Herron  .
French (Héron): nickname for a tall, thin person, thought to resemble a heron (Old French hairon).

variants.name: Herron
meanings: English: habitational name from Harome (North Yorkshire), from Old English (æt thǣm) hārum ‘at the (gray) stones’, dative plural of hār ‘gray, stone’.

English and Scottish: nickname probably for a tall, thin man with long legs, from Old French hairon ‘heron’, Anglo-Norman French heron, Middle English heiroun, heyron, herne, heron. Compare Hearn and Heron .
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from (Le) Héron in France (Seine-Maritime).

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John Heron I, Of Thomton was born in 1335, in Northumberland, England, his father, William Heron I, was 31 and his mother, Isabel de Grey, was 20. He died on 1 April 1409, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Heron I, Of Thomton est né en 1335, à Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, William Heron I, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Grey, avait 20 ans. Il est décédé le 1 avril 1409, à l’âge de 74 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Heron I, Of Thomton 1335 in Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Heron I 31 und seine Mutter Isabel de Grey 20. Er starb am 1. April 1409 im Alter von 74 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Heron I, Of Thomton è nato il nel 1335 nel Northumberland, England, il suo padre, William Heron I, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Isabel de Grey, aveva 20 anni. Morì il 1 aprile 1409, all'età di 74 anni.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Heron I, Of Thomton nasceu em 1335, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Heron I, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Isabel de Grey, tinha 20 anos. Ele faleceu em 1 de abril de 1409, com 74 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Heron I, Of Thomton родился в 1335 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени William Heron I было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Isabel de Grey, 20. Он умер 1 апреля 1409 г. в возрасте 74 лет.
